US singersAriana GrandeandPharrell Williamsare among the stars who have arrived inPariswhere the Olympics opening ceremony is taking place.

Beazley shares hit record high after £7.7bn takeover approach from Swiss rival

Who is Andrew Rosindell: London's first Reform MP who branded defectors 'selfish'

Hottest hotel openings for 2026

Discover a hidden island paradise in the Indian Ocean

The event is being held in the heart of the city, along its main artery, the Seine, and pop singerLady Gagawas photographed rehearsing beside the river ahead of her stellar performance on Friday evening.

Appearing at a red carpet event at theTrocadero, Williams, 51, wore aLouis Vuittonjumper paired with black shorts and a beige cap.

Meanwhile Yes, And? singer Grande, 31, opted to wear a light pink dress adorned with a bow and white gloves.

Standing alongside her was her Wicked co-starCynthia Erivowho plays Elphaba in the forthcoming musical movie in which Grande stars as Glinda.

TheLondon-born actress, 37, wore an emerald green strapless dress with a hat, gold jewellery and matching green nails.

Photos from rehearsals show Paparazzi singer Lady Gaga performing in black gloves with round pink props.

She is reportedly set to perform a version of Edith Piaf’s La Vie en Rose alongsideCeline Dionas part of a glittering conclusion to the first ever opening ceremony being staged outside a stadium.

Among the other stars pictured in front of theEiffel Towerwas The Vampire Diaries actressNina Dobrev.

The 35-year-old opted to wear a black and red leather jacket, black handbag and white shorts.

Braving the rain on Friday afternoon was editor in chief ofAmericanVogueAnna Wintourand film directorBaz Luhrmann.

While Wintour wore a blue vertically striped dressed with ballon sleeves, the Elvis director sported a cream coloured ensemble with a cap.

MusicianJohn Legendalso appeared at the event, alongside his wife and TV presenterChrissy Teigen.

Legend, who sang a version of John Lennon’s Imagine in a  video during the 2021 opening ceremony inTokyo, wore a suit and white shirt while Teigen opted for a khaki-coloured ensemble with gold buttons.

title: Ariana Grande, Pharrell Williams and John Legend among celebrities at Paris Olympics 2024 opening ceremony | The Standard
author: Hannah Roberts
description: Stars braved the rain to watch the spectacle on Friday
keywords: Paris, Ariana Grande, Lady Gaga, Anna Wintour, John Legend, Pharrell Williams, Trocadero, Chrissy Teigen, Baz Luhrmann, Cynthia Erivo, Louis Vuitton, London, Nina Dobrev, American, Celine Dion, Eiffel Tower, Tokyo
